description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Template for Custom Board Build that accepts a string input args. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, install Python 3.11 and PlatformIO build dependencies, pre-build to ensure the PlatformIO boards folder exists, copy a custom board JSON file to the boards folder, and then build using the provided args. Upload build artifacts on failure and exit with a non-zero status if the build fails.
